title: Heat Training Grant: heat pump scheme review
body: "The £5 million Heat Training Grant (HTG) supports installers in England taking training relevant to heat pumps and heat networks.  The Heat Training Grant Mid Scheme Review provides survey results from existing heating installers who have successfully completed the relevant heat pump training through the HTG.  The survey covers a number of areas to assess the performance of the HTG, including:   salary impact rate of heat pump installations rate of certification   The data tables provided are not part of an ongoing series and therefore represent a snapshot of the HTG performance. These results will be used to help inform future policy decisions.  See the application page for the Heat Training Grant discounted heat pump training.  "
